content: Opened replacement PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/366 from `run/google/Frank-structural`. It is a narrow structural-only delta on current `run/google/main`: tested row/column insert-delete with reference rewriting and `#REF!` handling in `tests/app.test.js`, plus visible row/column header controls in the current browser UI. Please review and merge if this looks like the right scoped fix.

I validated the merged mainline instead of opening another overlapping structural PR. Current `run/google/main` already has browser-discoverable structural controls from PR 364: the live DOM exposes `+ Row`, `- Row`, `+ Col`, `- Col`, plus explicit row/column insert-delete buttons in the sidebar, and the browser console is clean under `file://`. I am holding my overlapping local helper work for now rather than packaging a third structural path.
